hero.name: Le Tran Luan
hero.description: Aspiring Strategy Consultant with 8 years at EY, Manulife, and Prudential — translating complex market intelligence into decisive business strategies that move organisations forward.

paragraphs: My time at EY, Manulife, and Prudential has been a lesson in what actually makes a business move. I’ve learned that while a great strategy looks good on paper, its real value is found in the execution. I enjoy the quiet work of taking a complex idea and making it simple, practical, and useful for the people on the ground. Ultimately, I believe a strategy is only as strong as its implementation.

bullets: Developed need-based propositions to strengthen product positioning and distribution channel alignment
Spearheaded channel product launches and promotions, driving APE delivery across total portfolio
Monitored product portfolio performance versus market benchmarks and tracked budget execution
Produced comprehensive competitor intelligence and market trend reports for the Leadership team
Led and managed multi-disciplinary teams of up to 7 local and international consultants on bancassurance strategy engagements
Conducted comprehensive market research to identify key industry trends and growth opportunities for clients
Designed innovative solution proposals addressing complex business challenges for leading financial institutions
Analysed new regulatory requirements and assessed their strategic impact on the life insurance industry
Developed specialised insurance training programmes, enhancing team understanding of business forecasting and KPIs

experience.role: Executive Assistant to CAO & Agency Strategy
bullets: Enabled the Chief Agency Officer to lead an agency force of 60,000+ agents through strategic planning, reporting, and executive communication
Designed a business performance analysis framework and built forecasting models adopted by senior leadership
Prepared high-impact strategy decks and reports for C-suite executive meetings and board presentations
Drove cross-functional initiatives and contributed to agency engagement programme achieving top Gallup scores
Provided industry analysis, market trends, and actionable business insights to support CAO decision-making

experience.role: Agency Business Development & EA to CEO
bullets: Designed and executed sales contests aligned with corporate strategy, driving measurable agency performance
Managed the CEO's complex schedule and coordinated outreach activities with the Executive Team
Delivered market intelligence briefings and strategic insights directly to the CEO
Conducted business performance analysis and produced actionable business insight reports

posts.title: Investment Thesis: Saigon Ground Services (SGN)
posts.excerpt: A rigorous analysis of SGN — examining its business model, competitive positioning, and long-term value drivers in Vietnam's aviation ground services sector.

posts.title: Mujo — Change: Future's Only Certainty
posts.excerpt: Drawing on the Japanese Buddhist concept of impermanence, this piece explores why embracing change is a prerequisite for sound long-term strategic and investment thinking.

posts.excerpt: Browse the full archive of investment theses, market analysis, and strategic insights published on the blog.

contact.description: I'm actively exploring strategy and consulting roles. Whether you'd like to discuss an opportunity, collaborate, or simply exchange ideas — I'd love to hear from you.

side_projects.name: A Job Board for all life insurance companies
side_projects.description: A live job board tracking open positions across all Vietnamese life insurance companies — built to help industry professionals monitor hiring trends in one place.

side_projects.name: FoodiemeasureAI - App for people with Gout
side_projects.description: An app that could scan my food and instantly told me if the food is good for people with gout like me.
